title: Printing Parking Slot Numbers in Reverse

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use a for loop in C to print parking slot numbers in reverse, starting from 50 down to 40. The loop uses a negative step of 2 to simulate checking every alternate slot in reverse.

**When executed, the code will show:**
```default
Slot: 50
Slot: 48
Slot: 46
Slot: 44
Slot: 42
Slot: 40
```
